basis: Local seed identifies a legendary GU creature with X-spell and +1/+1 counter oracle text.
Scryfall card context and EDHREC Commander context exist.
WotC/Playgroup set context supports the Secrets of Strixhaven Commander release.

source_limit_notes: Infinite-mana X-spell lines are bracket/power opt-in, not default.
No copied public decklist or runtime dependency.

themes.name: simic_x_spells
themes.notes: The first X spell each turn becomes cheaper as Zimone gains +1/+1 counters.

themes.name: plus_one_counter_engine
themes.notes: Casting X spells grows Zimone, which further discounts future X spells.

themes.name: ramp_scalable_payoffs
themes.notes: Ramp and scalable spells convert the discount into cards, board, and finishers.

themes.name: proliferate_and_counter_doubling
themes.notes: Counter multipliers accelerate the commander but should not replace X-spell density.

examples: landfall/goodstuff pile with no X-spell density
avoid_patterns.reason: The commander specifically discounts X spells and grows from them.

examples: infinite mana into Blue Sun's Zenith as mandatory plan
avoid_patterns.reason: Combo power should be bracket-gated and was not proven as cEDH default.

examples: +1/+1 counter cards with no scalable spells
avoid_patterns.reason: Counters are infrastructure for X spells, not the entire deck.
